---
title: 'Connect'
date: '2022-02-22T05:25:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'NoHiding.Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '7182112948835291302'
blogger_filename: '/p/connect.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/NoHiding.Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;

</p><p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 12.0pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-weight: bold;">Social Media</span></p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">Facebook</p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/NoHiding.Faith/?ref=pages_you_manage">Facebook.com/NoHiding.Faith</a></p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 12.0pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-weight: bold;">Email</span></p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">Questions &amp;
Inquiries</p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><a href="mailto:questions@nohiding.faith?subject=Question%20from%20NoHiding.Faith">questions@nohiding.faith</a></p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 12.0pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-weight: bold;">Darrell's Blog</span></p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">My Random Musings...
</p>

<p style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><a href="https://www.darrellwolfe.com">DarrellWolfe.com</a></p>
